info.title: Visual Inspection Result Service
info.description: The service facilitates logging, reading, and storage of visual inspection results, including images and contextual data. It streamlines quality control processes, enhancing operational efficiency and decision-making in manufacturing.

x-sap-shortText: Log, read and store images of visual inspection results in Digital Manufacturing

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

get.description: Finds all visual inspection results using various filter parameters

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filters items by property values, see [Filtering](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionfilter)

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Orders items by property values, see [Sorting](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionorderby)

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Selects properties to be returned, see [Select](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionselect)

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The value of the $expand query option is a comma-separated list of navigation property names, stream property names, or a value indicating the stream content of a media-entity. The corresponding related entities and stream values will be represented inline, see [Expand](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionexpand)
The ID of the inspection result
parameters.name: id

get.summary: Finds a single visual inspection result by ID.
get.description: Find a single inspection result by providing its ID

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Selects properties to be returned, see [Select](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionselect)

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The value of the $expand query option is a comma-separated list of navigation property names, stream property names, or a value indicating the stream content of a media-entity. The corresponding related entities and stream values will be represented inline, see [Expand](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionexpand)
The ID of the inspection result
parameters.name: id

get.summary: Get the image of a visual inspection result.
get.description: Get the image of a visual inspection result by providing the associated visual inspection result ID.

Content-Disposition.description: A header for specifying the file name

put.summary: Stores an image for a visual inspection result.
put.description: Stores an image for a visual inspection result by providing the associated visual inspection result ID.

204.description: No Content. Image was successfully uploaded

GroundTruthBoundingBoxCreateRequest.description: The request to create the ground truth result of an annotated bounding box

topLeftX.description: The X value of the top left point of the bounding box

topLeftY.description: The Y value of the top left point of the bounding box

width.description: The width of the bounding box in percentage

height.description: The height of the bounding box in percentage

isPredicted.description: The flag that states whether the bounding box is model-predicted

GroundTruthBoundingBoxCreateResponse.description: The ground truth result response of an annotated bounding box of a nonconformance result

ID.description: The ID of the ground truth bounding box

topLeftX.description: The X value of the top left point of the bounding box

topLeftY.description: The Y value of the top left point of the bounding box

width.description: The width of the bounding box in percentage

height.description: The height of the bounding box in percentage

isPredicted.description: The flag that states whether the bounding box is model-predicted

ncResult_ID.description: The ID of the nonconformance result

topLeftX.description: The X value of the top left point of the bounding box

topLeftY.description: The Y value of the top left point of the bounding box

width.description: The width of the bounding box

height.description: The height value of the bounding box

PredictedBoundingBoxCreateRequest.description: The request to create a model-predicted bounding box

topLeftX.description: The X value of the top left point of the bounding box

topLeftY.description: The Y value of the top left point of the bounding box

width.description: The width of the bounding box

height.description: The height value of the bounding box

PredictedBoundingBoxCreateResponse.description: The response of a model-predicted bounding box

source.description: The source of the visual inspection result

modelName.description: The model name of the model that ran inference on the visual inspection result

modelVersion.description: The model version of the model that ran inference on the visual inspection result

hitRate.description: The hit rate is a calculated fraction of how agreeable the model prediction is with the ground truth

matchCount.description: The match count is the number of nonconformance results where the model agrees with the ground truth

mismatchCount.description: The mismatch count is the number of nonconformance results where the model disagrees with the ground truth

loggedCount.description: The logged count is the number of nonconformance results logged

notLoggedCount.description: The not logged count is the number of nonconformance results not logged

ncResultsCount.description: The number of nonconformance results in this visual inspection result

executedAt.description: The execution time of the visual inspection result

createdAt.description: The date and time when the visual inspection result is created

modifiedAt.description: The date and time when the visual inspection result is updated

ncName.description: The name for the nonconformance result

className.description: The class name of the nonconformance result

description.description: The description for the nonconformance result

prediction.description: The prediction for the nonconformance result

threshold.description: The threshold for the nonconformance result

predictedBoundingBox_ID.description: The model-predicted bounding box of the nonconformance result

top.name: $top
top.description: Shows only the first n items, see [Paging - Top](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptiontop)

skip.name: $skip
skip.description: Skips the first n items, see [Paging - Skip](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionskip)

count.name: $count
count.description: Includes the count of items, see [Count](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptioncount)

search.name: $search
search.description: Searches items by search phrases, see [Searching](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionsearch)
